chapter_title.ar: باب الْبَوْلِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ أَوِ الْجَسَدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 36 – The urine hitting the clothes or the body

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/157)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/157)
text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) الطِّنْفِسَةُ وَ الْفِرَاشُ يُصِيبُهُمَا الْبَوْلُ كَيْفَ يُصْنَعُ بِهِمَا وَ هُوَ ثَخِينٌ كَثِيرُ الْحَشْوِ قَالَ يُغْسَلُ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهُ فِي وَجْهِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Mahmoud who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The carpet and the bedding both being hit by the urine, how to deal with these two and it is bulky with a lot of padding’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Wash whatever is apparent from it regarding its surface’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ibrahim ibn abu Mahmud who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about how one should deal with velvet-like carpet and the beds that come in contact with urine, which are thick and bulky. He (the Imam) said, ‘Whatever is on the surface of such items must be washed clean.’”
